title: Day 1 Forecast Discussion
discussion:
Weak thunderstorms are expected today for Poland

GNRL
E Poland

Thunderstorms are expected today for the region. They will be mostly scattered and could be during rain showers as these past few days.
The main threats are:
- Hail (up to 1cm possible)
- Strong wind gusts
- Heavy rain

TSTM Regions
NW Germany, SW Germany & W Austria

The ingredients for thunderstorms are present, but due to very strong CIN (Convective Inhibition or cap prevents storms from forming) potential thunderstorms most likely wont initiate.
